title: DblClick Event
description: Occurs when a control is double clicked.
notes: The DblClick event is used to respond to a double click on a control by the user. You can use the Sender$ parameter to determine which control sent the event.
see_also:
Applies To

Label, ListBox, Led, PictureBox, VideoBox, LED, ProgressBar, Grid

Click Event

GUI Items: DblClick Event

Button, Label, TextBox, RadioButton, CheckBox, ListBox, ComboBox, PictureBox, GroupBox
examples:
Function frmMain_lstModels_DblClick(Sender$ As String)
   Integer index
   GGet frmMain.lstModels.SelectedIndex, index
   GGet frmMain.lstModels.List(index), g_CurrModel$
Fend
